Interface IAISRequest

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Carto
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Carto.dll

Provides access to members that controls an AIS request.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("E55EF83E-4042-49C6-8B54-BB0C3FFA982F")]
public interface IAISRequest

Properties

Arguments

The AIS request arguments.

IStringArray Arguments { get; set; }

Property Value

IStringArray

Examples

Sample Snippet

GeoImageDescription

The request image description.

IGeoImageDescription GeoImageDescription { get; set; }

Property Value

IGeoImageDescription

Examples

Sample Snippet

Name

The AIS request name, e.g. PutServiceProperties, and etc.

string Name { get; set; }
